candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; best match for total revenue/sales.
Financial income, not operating revenue; not a revenue/sales line.
Interest income, not top-line operating revenue.
Tax expense line, unrelated to revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not revenue.
Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the direct operating revenue line as the REVT priority label.

candidates.row_label: Cost of materials and other project costs
candidates.why: Clear direct cost / cost of sales style label; strong COGS match.

candidates.row_label: Material Expenses - Materials, Inventory, Own Work & Utility
candidates.why: Also a direct materials cost label and likely used in some years as the COGS-equivalent.
Balance sheet inventory asset, not an income statement expense.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of materials and other project costs

variables.notes: CR:c||misclassified. Included both direct-cost labels because they appear to reflect reporting-label changes across years and do not appear simultaneously populated in the preview.

candidates.why: Best explicit overhead/operating expense bucket available; populated and suitable under the SG&A hierarchy.
Headcount metric on balance sheet, not an expense row.

variables.notes: CR:c||misclassified. Selected only 'Operating expenses' per SG&A hierarchy as the best explicit overhead bucket. Excluded payroll/rental/bad debt rows because they are not in the candidate list and the existing candidate already matches well; excluded balancing and D&A lines.
No dedicated research and development line is visible on the provided income statement.

candidates.why: Operating profit measure, not interest expense.
Best all-in recurring finance cost line; preferable here because granular interest components are incomplete across years.
Pure interest expense component, but missing in 2025 and appears incomplete versus total finance expenses.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest sub-component, but only partial coverage and should not be combined with total finance expenses.
Net finance line can include income/offsets; less preferred than finance expenses here.
Profit attribution line, unrelated to interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-interest component; not preferred over primary line.
Equity line, unrelated to interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not period interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the single finance-cost total to avoid double counting, since underlying interest components are incomplete and some years only report the total.

candidates.row_label: Share of net profit of equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: Income statement profit-share line, not equity.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to shareholders of the Company
candidates.why: Net income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution line, not balance sheet equity.
Asset/investment line, not shareholders' equity.
Best match for parent/shareholder equity excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests and would risk double counting with MIB.

variables.notes: Preferred shareholder-only equity to exclude non-controlling interests, consistent with BE + MIB construction.

candidates.why: Income statement profit attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.
Direct balance sheet minority interest / NCI line; exact target match.
Income statement attribution total, not preferred over balance sheet NCI line.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Selected the balance sheet NCI line as the proper MIB measure.
